prediction.reasoning: For an 18-day prediction of Goldman Sachs stock, I used a geometric Brownian motion model with historical volatility estimates typical for large financial stocks (~25-30% annualized). The point estimate assumes no drift over this short period. The confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty with higher confidence levels, accounting for typical daily volatility of ~1.6% and the square root scaling of volatility over 18 days.
